sql_array: CREATE TABLE trigonometry (angle FLOAT, cos_value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO trigonometry (angle, cos_value) VALUES (30, cos(30));
INSERT INTO trigonometry (angle, cos_value) VALUES (60, cos(60));
UPDATE trigonometry SET cos_value = cos(angle) WHERE angle = 90;
SELECT angle, cos(cos_value) AS adjusted_cos FROM trigonometry;
